## 🎨 UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML**: Used appropriate elements.
- [ ] **Keyboard Nav**: All interactive elements reachable via Tab.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels**: Added to icon-only elements.
- [ ] **Color Contrast**: Meets WCAG AA standards.
- [ ] **Focus States**: Visible and consistent.
- [ ] **Responsiveness**: UI works on mobile.
